code:
fn to_roman(_ n: Int) -> String
  mut result = ""
  let tens = n / 10
  mut i = 0
  while i < tens
    result = "#{result}X"
    i = i + 1
  end
  let ones = n % 10
  if ones == 9
    result = "#{result}IX"
  else if ones >= 5
    result = "#{result}V"
    mut j = 0
    while j < ones - 5
      result = "#{result}I"
      j = j + 1
    end
  else if ones == 4
    result = "#{result}IV"
  else
    mut j = 0
    while j < ones
      result = "#{result}I"
      j = j + 1
    end
  end
  result
end

fn main() -> Unit
  println(to_roman(4))
  println(to_roman(9))
  println(to_roman(27))
  println(to_roman(39))
end
